mapper.select: SELECT LOG_ID AS logId, LAST_PAGE AS lastPage, TOTAL_PAGES AS totalPages, COLLECT_SYNC AS collectSync, UPDATE_SYNC AS updateSync, STATUS AS status, DAILY_CALLS AS dailyCalls, LAST_RESET_DATE AS lastResetDate FROM API_SYNC_LOG WHERE LOG_ID = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE API_SYNC_LOG SET LAST_PAGE = #{lastPage}, TOTAL_PAGES = #{totalPages}, COLLECT_SYNC = #{collectSync}, UPDATE_SYNC = #{updateSync}, STATUS = #{status}, DAILY_CALLS = #{dailyCalls}, LAST_RESET_DATE = #{lastResetDate} WHERE LOG_ID = 1
